evals.prompt: I have a Chinese draft of a machine learning paper. Help me translate and format it into English academic LaTeX.
evals.expected_output: Runs the workflow selector, routes to cn-to-en, reads the upstream prompt contract, and produces English academic LaTeX output following the cached standard.

evals.prompt: Polish the introduction section of my English research paper. Make it more concise and academic.
evals.expected_output: Routes to en-refine, reads the cached upstream section for English polishing, applies logic checks and shortening while preserving the LaTeX surface.

evals.prompt: Set up the AI research writing tools and external components for my local environment.
evals.expected_output: Reads references/components-and-setup.md, generates an installation plan with scripts/install_components.py, and only executes after explicit user approval.
